name: Physics Concepts Lab
topic_groups: Light, shadow, reflection, sound, push-pull force, simple motion
Circuits, magnets, heat transfer, friction, floating/sinking, pressure, density
Speed, acceleration, force, work, energy, power, Ohm law, ray optics
Safety with electricity, sunlight/lenses, heat, home observation, and low-voltage activity boundaries
fixes: Expanded Physics from 32 to 40 lessons in the prior QA pass.
Added caveats for magnets, heat transfer, electricity-bill estimates, and safe low-voltage circuits.
Kept prototype label because Physics still needs a second visual-interaction QA pass.
limitations: Should not be called stable curriculum coverage until every diagram, numerical example, and visual interaction is independently verified.
